definitions.subtitle: ={{ $parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"] }}
definitions.description: AI-powered answer engine that provides accurate, trusted, and real-time answers to any question. Supports chat completions, agent responses, web search, and embeddings.

options.name: Set Automatically
options.description: Automatically set based on resource and operation

options.name: Set Manually
options.description: Manually set the description

properties.name: toolDescription
properties.default: AI-powered answer engine that provides accurate, trusted, and real-time answers to any question. Supports chat completions, agent responses, web search, and embeddings.
properties.description: Explain to the LLM what this tool does, a good, specific description would allow LLMs to produce expected results much more often

options.name: Agent
options.description: Create responses using the Agent API with third-party models, presets, tools, and structured outputs

options.name: Chat
options.description: Send messages using Sonar models with built-in web search

options.name: Embedding
options.description: Generate vector embeddings for text

options.name: Search
options.description: Get raw, ranked web search results

options.name: Create Response
options.description: Create a response using the Agent API with third-party models, presets, and tools

properties.name: input
properties.description: The input text prompt to send to the agent

properties.name: model
properties.description: The model to use. Uses provider/model format (e.g. openai/gpt-5.2). Leave empty when using a preset.

properties.name: preset
properties.description: Preset name to use. Use preset OR model, not both.
properties.hint: Use a preset OR a model, not both

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return only essential fields (ID, model, output text, citations)

properties.value: ={{ { "id": $response.body?.id, "model": $response.body?.model, "output_text": $response.body?.output?.find(o => o.type === "message")?.content?.find(c => c.type === "output_text")?.text, "citations": $response.body?.output?.find(o => o.type === "search_results")?.results?.map(r => ({ title: r.title, url: r.url })), "usage": $response.body?.usage } }}

options.name: instructions
options.description: System-level instructions for the agent

options.name: languagePreference
options.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the response language preference

options.name: maxOutputTokens
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the response

options.name: maxSteps
options.description: Maximum number of agentic steps (1-10)

options.name: modelsFallback
options.description: Comma-separated list of 1-5 model IDs to use as fallbacks

options.name: reasoning
options.description: Reasoning configuration object (e.g. {"effort": "high"})

options.name: responseFormat
options.description: JSON schema for structured output. Set type to "json_schema" with a schema property.

options.name: tools
options.description: Array of tool objects to make available to the agent

options.name: Message a Model
options.description: Create one or more completions for a given text

properties.name: model
properties.description: The model which will generate the completion

properties.name: messages
properties.description: Any optional system messages must be sent first, followed by alternating user and assistant messages

values.name: content
values.description: The content of the message to be sent

values.name: role

options.name: Assistant
options.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality. Must alternate with user messages.

options.name: System
options.description: Set the models behavior or context. Must come before user and assistant messages.

options.name: User
options.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

values.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return only essential fields (ID, citations, message)

options.name: disableSearch
options.description: Whether to disable web search for this request

options.name: enableSearchClassifier
options.description: Whether to enable the search classifier

options.name: frequencyPenalty
options.description: Values greater than 1.0 penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim

options.name: imageDomainFilter
options.description: Comma-separated list of domains to filter image results from

options.name: imageFormatFilter
options.description: Comma-separated list of image formats to filter results by

options.name: languagePreference
options.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the response language preference

options.name: lastUpdatedAfter
options.description: Filter results last updated after this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: lastUpdatedBefore
options.description: Filter results last updated before this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: maxTokens
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion. The number of tokens requested plus the number of prompt tokens sent in messages must not exceed the context window token limit of model requested.

options.name: temperature
options.description: The amount of randomness in the response, valued between 0 inclusive and 2 exclusive. Higher values are more random, and lower values are more deterministic.

options.name: presencePenalty
options.description: A value between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.

options.name: reasoningEffort
options.description: The level of reasoning effort to apply

options.name: responseFormat
options.description: JSON schema for structured output. Set type to "json_schema" with a schema property.

options.name: returnImages
options.description: Whether or not a request to an online model should return images. Requires Perplexity API usage Tier-2.

options.name: returnRelatedQuestions
options.description: Whether or not a request to an online model should return related questions. Requires Perplexity API usage Tier-2.

options.name: searchAfterDate
options.description: Filter results published after this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: searchBeforeDate
options.description: Filter results published before this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: searchDomainFilter
options.description: Limit the citations used by the online model to URLs from the specified domains. For blacklisting, add a - to the beginning of the domain string (e.g., -domain1). Currently limited to 3 domains. Requires Perplexity API usage Tier-3.

options.name: searchLanguageFilter
options.description: Comma-separated list of ISO 639-1 language codes to filter results by (max 20)

options.name: searchMode
options.description: The search mode to use for retrieving information

options.name: searchRecency
options.description: Returns search results within the specified time interval

options.name: stop
options.description: Comma-separated list of sequences where the model should stop generating

options.name: topK
options.description: The number of tokens to keep for highest Top K filtering, specified as an integer between 0 and 2048 inclusive. If set to 0, Top K filtering is disabled. We recommend either altering Top K or Top P, but not both.

options.name: topP
options.description: The nucleus sampling threshold, valued between 0 and 1 inclusive. For each subsequent token, the model considers the results of the tokens with Top P probability mass. We recommend either altering Top K or Top P, but not both.

options.name: webSearchOptions
options.description: Advanced web search configuration object

options.name: Create Embedding
options.description: Generate vector embeddings for text input

options.name: Create Contextualized Embedding
options.description: Generate context-aware embeddings for document chunks

properties.name: input
properties.description: Text(s) to embed. Put each text on a separate line.

options.name: dimensions
options.description: Number of dimensions for the output embedding. If 0 or unset, the full model dimensions are used.

options.name: encoding_format
options.description: The format of the returned embeddings

properties.name: model
properties.description: The contextualized embedding model to use

properties.name: input
properties.default: [["paragraph 1 of doc A", "paragraph 2 of doc A"], ["paragraph 1 of doc B"]]
properties.description: Array of documents, where each document is an array of paragraph strings

options.name: dimensions
options.description: Number of dimensions for the output embedding. If 0 or unset, the full model dimensions are used.

options.name: encoding_format
options.description: The format of the returned embeddings. Float is not supported by this endpoint.

options.name: Search
options.description: Get raw, ranked web search results with filtering and content extraction

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return only the ID and results array

options.name: country
options.description: 2-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to localize search results

options.name: lastUpdatedAfter
options.description: Filter results last updated after this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: lastUpdatedBefore
options.description: Filter results last updated before this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: maxResults
options.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-20)

options.name: maxTokens
options.description: Maximum number of tokens in the response

options.name: maxTokensPerPage
options.description: Maximum number of tokens per page of results

options.name: searchAfterDate
options.description: Filter results published after this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: searchBeforeDate
options.description: Filter results published before this date (MM/DD/YYYY)

options.name: searchDomainFilter
options.description: Comma-separated list of domains to limit search results to (max 20)

options.name: searchLanguageFilter
options.description: Comma-separated list of ISO 639-1 language codes to filter results by (max 20)

options.name: searchRecencyFilter
options.description: Filter search results by publication recency

values.name: batchSize
values.description: Input will be split in batches to throttle requests. -1 for disabled. 0 will be treated as 1.

values.name: batchInterval
values.description: Time (in milliseconds) between each batch of requests. 0 for disabled.

options.name: allowUnauthorizedCerts
options.description: Whether to accept the response even if SSL certificate validation is not possible

options.name: proxy
options.description: HTTP proxy to use. If authentication is required it can be defined as follow: http://username:password@myproxy:3128

options.name: timeout
options.description: Time in ms to wait for the server to send response headers (and start the response body) before aborting the request

definitions.name: n8n-nodes-base.perplexityTool
